chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3196 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on M.A. 12304/2022 For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 12305/2022 For hearing of main case 13.10.2022 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang advocate for petitioner. ----- Grievance of the petitioner is that respondents No.5 to 8 are drug paddlers and whenever petitioner tries to stop them, they cause harassment to him. In support of his contention, he has filed at least 04 photostat copies of FIRs without however explaining as to whether the respondents are accused in those cases or not. In any case, we direct the petitioner to file a proper application before the SSP concerned, who shall afford an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and decide his application in accordance with law. Petition along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
